title: Chain 1/8: Farmers Market
scene: 周末你去农夫市集买新鲜蔬果。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.cn: 早上好！今天的草莓刚摘的。
turns.en: Good morning! These strawberries were picked today.
How much? Can I try one?
Four dollars a basket. Go ahead and taste.
So sweet! I'll take a basket of tomatoes too.

turns.cn: 一共九块，只收现金或 Venmo。
turns.en: Nine total. Cash or Venmo only.
No cards?
Sorry, we don't have a card reader.

title: Chain 2/8: Buy Fresh Fish
scene: 你在市场鱼摊买海鲜。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.en: The salmon is really fresh today.

turns.cn: 要一块两磅左右的，能帮忙去骨吗？
turns.en: I'd like about two pounds, boneless, please.
Sure. Fillets or a whole side?
Fillets. I'm grilling tonight.

turns.cn: 建议挤点柠檬，别烤太久。
turns.en: A little lemon helps. Don't overcook it.
Sounds good. Add half a pound of shrimp too.

title: Chain 3/8: Bargain for Scarf
scene: 你在露天市场买手工围巾。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.en: Handmade scarf, twenty-five dollars.
Can you do a better price for two?
Forty for two.
How about thirty-five? Cash.
Thirty-eight. That's my final offer.
Deal.

title: Chain 4/8: Asian Grocery
scene: 你在亚洲超市找调料。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.en: Excuse me, where can I find Lao Gan Ma chili sauce?

turns.cn: 调料区，过道七，左边货架。
turns.en: Aisle seven, sauces section, left side.
Do you have fresh tofu?

turns.cn: 在冷藏柜，每天上午到货。
turns.en: In the refrigerated case. Deliveries come every morning.
Thanks! What time do you close?
Ten PM.

title: Chain 5/8: Pick Vegetables
scene: 你在蔬菜摊挑青菜，问摊主新不新鲜。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.en: Did this spinach arrive today?
Unloaded this morning. Very tender.

turns.cn: 来两把，青椒要红的还是绿的？
turns.en: Two bunches. Red or green bell peppers?

turns.cn: 红的甜，绿的脆，做菜都行。
turns.en: Red is sweeter, green is crunchier. Both work for cooking.
Three of each, please.

title: Chain 6/8: Meat Counter
scene: 你在肉铺买猪肉馅。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.cn: 要一磅猪肉馅，瘦一点的。
turns.en: One pound of ground pork, on the lean side.
Eighty percent lean okay?
Sure. Making dumplings tonight.

turns.cn: 要帮您绞现成还是已有？
turns.en: Grind it fresh or use what's ready?
Fresh, please. Thanks.

title: Chain 7/8: Parking Meter
scene: 采购完回车上，你发现停车时间快到了。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.cn: 买得够多的，车放得下吗？
turns.en: That's a lot. Will it fit in the car?

turns.cn: 后备箱应该行，快，停车计时快过期了。
turns.en: Trunk should work. Quick, the meter's almost up.
I'll feed the meter. You load the car.
Okay. Fish on top, don't crush it.

title: Chain 8/8: Cook at Home
scene: 你们回家准备用刚买的食材做饭。（对话链：菜市场）

turns.en: Grill or dumplings tonight?

turns.cn: 鱼烧烤，肉馅包饺子，蔬菜炒一盘。
turns.en: Grill the fish, dumplings from the pork, stir-fry the veggies.
I'll knead the dough. You prep the fish.
Strawberries for dessert.
Perfect market run.
Love shopping here on weekends.
